moments.transcript: I have a job lined up with Teach for America. I haven't graduated yet, but they did give me an offer, and I plan to teach economics in the Rio Grande Valley. I've always wanted to be a teacher at some point, and I thought this would be the best avenue to do it, because economics is very applicable to life. And seeing how it can apply in their lives,
moments.peak_text: and I thought this would be the best avenue to do it,

moments.transcript: So if I can incorporate that into my lesson plans, then it'll help them learn to budget and think about how am I going to pay for college and things like that.
